outputs.review.json:
{
  "variables": [
    {
      "variable": "DISCONFL",
      "label": "Did Subject Discontinue?",
      "type": "Char",
      "length": 1,
      "origin": "Derived",
      "derivation": "Set to 'Y' if subject discontinued from study (DS.DSDECOD='COMPLETED' is absent or DS.DSTERM contains discontinuation indicator); otherwise 'N'. Derived from DS domain where DSSTDTC is not null and DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT'.",
      "values": ["Y", "N"],
      "source_domain": "DS"
    },
    {
      "variable": "DSRAEFL",
      "label": "Discontinued due to AE?",
      "type": "Char",
      "length": 1,
      "origin": "Derived",
      "derivation": "Set to 'Y' if subject discontinued due to adverse event (DS.DSDECOD='ADVERSE EVENT' or DS.DSTERM contains 'ADVERSE EVENT' where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT'); otherwise 'N'. Requires DISCONFL='Y'.",
      "values": ["Y", "N"],
      "source_domain": "DS"
    },
    {
      "variable": "EOSSTT",
      "label": "End of Study Status",
      "type": "Char",
      "length": 14,
      "origin": "Derived",
      "derivation": "Set to 'COMPLETED' if DS.DSDECOD='COMPLETED' where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT'; set to 'DISCONTINUED' if subject has discontinuation record in DS (DSDECOD not equal to 'COMPLETED'). Derived from DS domain disposition records.",
      "values": ["COMPLETED", "DISCONTINUED"],
      "source_domain": "DS"
    },
    {
      "variable": "DCSREAS",
      "label": "Reason for Discontinuation",
      "type": "Char",
      "length": 40,
      "origin": "SDTM.DS",
      "derivation": "Populated from DS.DSDECOD where DSCAT='DISPOSITION EVENT' and subject discontinued (DSDECOD not equal to 'COMPLETED'). Contains the primary reason for study discontinuation. Set to null if DISCONFL='N' or EOSSTT='COMPLETED'.",
      "values": ["ADVERSE EVENT", "LACK OF EFFICACY", "LOST TO FOLLOW-UP", "PHYSICIAN DECISION", "PROTOCOL VIOLATION", "WITHDRAWAL BY SUBJECT", "OTHER"],
      "source_domain": "DS"
    }
  ]
}
